title: Fig. 1. Gel electrophoresis stained with ethidium bromide showing 2 in First record of a spotted fever group Rickettsia sp. and Theileria annulata in Hyalomma dromedarii (Acari: Ixodidae) ticks in the United Arab Emirates
author: Al-Deeb, Mohammad Ali

description: Fig. 1. Gel electrophoresis stained with ethidium bromide showing 2 DNA positive samples of Theileria annulata and spotted fever group (SFG) Rickettsia sp. amplified by PCR. Lane M: represents 100-bp DNA ladder (Promega, USA).
